Title: FurQuiet Grooming Vacuum Kit
Body (HTML):
FurQuiet is a quiet-start pet grooming vacuum kit for heavy-shedding dogs and long-hair cats. It helps owners brush loose fur while suction collects hair into a transparent dust cup, reducing cleanup after routine grooming sessions.

The kit includes a compact vacuum base, flexible hose, de-shedding brush, slicker brush, clipper body, clipper guards, nozzle, washable filter care, cleaning brush, and storage dock.

  • Low-noise grooming workflow for nervous pets
  • De-shedding brush captures loose undercoat into the dust cup
  • Clipper support for paws, belly, and sanitary-area maintenance
  • Transparent dust cup creates visible proof for photos and short videos
  • Compact storage dock for apartments and small homes
